top_signals.title: The U.S. sanctions Nobitex crypto exchange used by ransomware
top_signals.summary: The U.S. Treasury's Office of Foreign Assets Control (OFAC) has announced sanctions against Nobitex, Iran's largest cryptocurrency exchange, for facilitating payments related to terrorist activities. [...]
top_signals.why_it_matters: Geopolitical escalation affecting commodities, shipping and cross-asset volatility.

top_signals.title: Experts warn terrorism threat is rising in Africa as US pulls back
top_signals.summary: A jihadist front is gaining ground across Africa, the Center for Strategic and International Studies warned in its annual risk analysis.
top_signals.why_it_matters: Geopolitical escalation affecting commodities, shipping and cross-asset volatility.

top_signals.title: Broadcom stock slips on disappointing software revenue
top_signals.summary: Broadcom reported fiscal second-quarter results on Wednesday and missed estimates for revenue.
top_signals.why_it_matters: Geopolitical escalation affecting commodities, shipping and cross-asset volatility.

top_signals.title: America's H-1B Housing Bust
top_signals.summary: North of Dallas, towns like Frisco, Prosper and Celina became some of the fastest-growing suburbs in the US, fueled in part by corporate relocations and Indian-born workers with H-1B visas. But tech layoffs, higher visa costs, tighter immigration rules and AI disruption are now cooling demand in a housing market built around rapid growth. (Source: Bloomberg)
top_signals.why_it_matters: AI and semiconductor developments impacting technology leadership and capex cycles.

top_signals.title: USDA Says New World Screwworm Case May Have Been Detected in US
top_signals.summary: The US Department of Agriculture said a case of New World screwworm may have been detected in South Texas, a development that could pose a fresh threat to the nation’s cattle herd already at its lowest level in 75 years.
top_signals.why_it_matters: AI and semiconductor developments impacting technology leadership and capex cycles.

top_signals.title: Bitmine's Ethereum bet nears $9 billion loss as ether falls below $1,800
top_signals.why_it_matters: Digital asset volatility and institutional crypto positioning changes.
